reapack.name: Articulation Roll
reapack.desc: Articulation Roll — keyswitch articulation manager (port of the Ableton extension)

version.author: AviouslyAvi
version.changelog: 1.3 — Ableton feature parity in the app. - Auto-pitch: cascade keyswitch notes upward from the first articulation. - Dedupe + Legato note actions (ported 1:1 from the Ableton version), undoable. - Edit mode: multi-row select (click color chip, shift-click ranges), Select all, Delete selected, and a keyswitch keyboard visualiser. 1.2 — channel-based articulations (note coloring + bug fix). - Each articulation owns a MIDI channel; assigning retags the notes' channel so they recolor (set the MIDI editor note-color dropdown to "Channel"). - Fixes lingering keyswitch notes when changing articulations on stacked notes. - App: color-coded buttons, per-articulation channel + color swatch in Edit. 1.1 — add the ReaImGui app (dockable banks/articulations panel). - ArticulationRoll_App.lua: pick a bank, click to apply, edit names/pitches inline. - Multi-bank config (ArticulationRoll_banks.lua), edited entirely in the panel. 1.0 — Initial ReaPack release. - Shared engine (ArticulationRoll_lib.lua) ported 1:1 from the Ableton extension. - Pop-up menu action (assign / clear / rebuild / edit map). - 8 bindable per-slot assign actions + Clear + Rebuild, all in the MIDI Editor section.

metadata.description:
Articulation Roll for REAPER
Tag melodic notes with an articulation and auto-generate the matching keyswitch notes into the take — the Reaticulate-style workflow, ported 1:1 from the Ableton "Articulation Roll" extension.
Includes a dockable ReaImGui app (ArticulationRoll_App.lua) — pick a bank, click an articulation to apply it, edit bank/articulation names and keyswitch pitches in the panel. The app requires the "ReaImGui" extension (install separately via ReaPack).
Also installs a pop-up menu plus bindable per-slot assign actions (1-8), Clear, and Rebuild in the MIDI Editor action list (no ReaImGui needed; these use the text map at <REAPER resource path>/ArticulationRoll_map.txt).
